Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS
REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Establishes a commission to reform tier V and tier VI membership status in the New York state and local employees' retirement system
Summary: Establishes a commission to reform tier V and tier VI membership status in the New York state and local employees' retirement system.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to establishing a temporary commission to reform tier V and tier VI status in the New York state and local employees' retirement system; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon the expiration thereof
